raw_consumer_statement: On or about XX/XX/XXXX, I made a police report XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, with XXXX XXXX XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX XXXX, to report XXXX XXXX, XXXX : XX/XX/XXXX, who came to my home to make a few repairs. XXXX XXXX stole several items inside my home, including, material to complete the repairs, brushes, primer, spatulas and an array of other items, and, my Home Depot credit card, # XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, from my purse, which was on the mantle. I made a police report regarding the missing items. On or about XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX XXXX XXXX line contacted me at XXXX, to report declined charges of {$1400.00} and another large amount ( {$1000.00} ), which XXXX XXXX considered fraudulent charges on my Home Depot Credit card. In addition, XXXX XXXX allowed several smaller charges and inquired as to whether I made all of the charges on XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX. I informed XXXX XXXX XXXX that I did not make the charges in question and did not authorize the charges, including : on XX/XX/XXXX for {$390.00} ; XX/XX/XXXX, for {$570.00} ; {$330.00} and {$67.00} ; XX/XX/XXXX, for {$520.00} and {$29.00} ; for a total of XXXX XXXX, within a XXXX day period. Activity that is inconsistent with my spending activity. I denied making the unauthorized charges to my XXXX XXXX credit card. XXXX XXXX conducted their investigation, without contacting me to get my input, and seemingly made general assumptions about the charges and attributed the charges as my responsibility, despite my denial. On XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX XXXX sent me correspondence to notify me that they concluded the charges were my responsibility. On XX/XX/XXXX, I contacted XXXX XXXX XXXX unit to dispute XXXX XXXX findings and the fraudulent charges, XXXX XXXX has re-billed my account
